de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews

Class InnerNodeViewListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews.InnerNodeViewListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.event.MouseListener, java.util.EventListener

    public class InnerNodeViewListener
extends java.lang.Object
    Listener for an InnerNodeView Reacts on mouse events to highlight the selected part of the sequent and it pops up a menu showing all applicable actions at the highlighted position.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int POPUP_DELAY
      The delay after closing a popup menu before another menu may be opened.
